news.title: Emerging markets could soar this year, says CIO
news.body: <body><p>STORY: "If you look at earnings revisions in emerging markets, they're actually up 30%. So there is a lot of growth happening overseas that investors are not necessarily paying close attention to," says Isherwood, addin…

news.title: Spyglass Capital Dumps $26 Million of Global-e Online Amid Stock's 24% Decline
news.body: Global-E Online enables cross-border e-commerce for retailers and brands, serving international merchants through its proprietary platform.

news.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Closes Above 50,000; Nvidia Rises Ahead Of Earnings (Live Coverage)
news.body: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index and the other major indexes posted hefty gains on Wednesday. Small caps outperformed the major indexes.
